task_completion.description: Navigate to the Manage fields page for the Default Order type.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the Drupal admin interface at Commerce -> Configuration -> Orders -> Order types -> Default -> Manage fields.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Gift Message' custom field with the correct type and machine name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Manage fields' list shows a field labeled 'Gift Message' with machine name 'field_gift_message' and field type 'Text (plain, long)'.

task_completion.description: Create the 'Gift Wrap Requested' custom field with the correct type and machine name.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Manage fields' list shows a field labeled 'Gift Wrap Requested' with machine name 'field_gift_wrap' and field type 'Boolean'.

task_completion.description: Ensure both fields are optional (not required).
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the field settings edit screens for both fields, the 'Required field' checkbox is unchecked, OR if viewing the final order form, neither field has a red asterisk indicating it is required.

task_completion.description: Enable the 'Gift Message' field on the order admin form display.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Manage form display' tab for the Default Order type, 'Gift Message' is listed in the active region (not under the 'Disabled' section).

task_completion.description: Enable the 'Gift Wrap Requested' field on the order admin form display.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Manage form display' tab for the Default Order type, 'Gift Wrap Requested' is listed in the active region (not under the 'Disabled' section).

integrity.description: Agent used the Drupal web interface to create the fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interacting with the Drupal admin UI, rather than terminal commands (like Drush) being used to generate the fields.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Drupal Commerce application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches standard Drupal 9/10 Commerce administration pages, not a text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a database client to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no screenshots of SQL queries or database management tools (like phpMyAdmin) being used to insert field configurations directly.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task requires adding two custom fields to the Drupal Commerce 'Default' Order type. 1) 'Gift Message': Label 'Gift Message', machine name 'field_gift_message', type 'Text (plain, long)' (maps to string_long, do NOT accept formatted text_long). 2) 'Gift Wrap Requested': Label 'Gift Wrap Requested', machine name 'field_gift_wrap', type 'Boolean'. Both fields must be optional (not required) and placed in the active/enabled section of the 'Manage form display' tab.
